Sample data for email extraction tests.

Valid emails:
  user@domain.com
  admin@example.com
  support@example.org
  noreply@github.com
  first.last@subdomain.example.co.uk

Invalid (should not match):
  @nodomain
  noatsign.com
  double@@at.com

parse_query extracts these from text fields.
TODO: add international domain name support (münchen.de)
IP addresses for network tests: 192.168.1.1, 10.0.0.1, 172.16.254.1
URL references: https://example.com/data https://api.example.com/v2/emails
